title: Entry Identity, Idempotent Upsert, Revisions, and Deletion Semantics
description: Every poll inserts duplicates, title edits create new posts, reused GUIDs overwrite unrelated content, disappeared entries are deleted immediately, and revision causes vanish. Learners cumulatively produce idempotent versioned entry ingestion model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Bind external entry identity to feed scope and format semantics, detect collisions, and retain the raw identity basis.
Insert new, ignore unchanged, version changed, and quarantine conflicting entries atomically under unique constraints.
Store meaningful normalized revisions with source fetch, field diff, timestamps, and bounded retention instead of overwriting evidence.
